sisyphus.prompt_append: Git guardrails: create signed commits only. Use conventional commit format with strict 50/72 wrapping. Never add AI attribution markers, co-authored-by footers, or commit footers. Never force-push to main or master. Never use --no-verify. If pull or push requires authentication, stop and ask the human.

visual-engineering.description: Frontend, UI/UX, design, styling, animation, CSS, layout

ultrabrain.description: Genuinely hard, logic-heavy tasks requiring deep reasoning

deep.description: Goal-oriented autonomous problem-solving with thorough research

artistry.description: Complex problems requiring unconventional, creative approaches

quick.description: Trivial tasks — single file changes, typo fixes, simple modifications
quick.prompt_append: For terse, signal-only responses, invoke the `caveman` skill (no preamble, no fluff, just the answer).

unspecified-low.description: Low effort tasks that don't fit other categories

unspecified-high.description: High effort tasks that don't fit other categories

writing.prompt_append: For prose editing, invoke the `edit-article` skill to apply structural and stylistic improvements.
